text: Hello and welcome to Real Easy English, the podcast where we have real conversations in easy English to help you learn.
zh: 大家好,欢迎收听《Real Easy English》,这是一档用简单英语进行真实对话、帮助大家学习英语的播客节目。

text: I'm Beth.
zh: 我是Beth。

text: And I'm Neil.
zh: 我是Neil。

text: There is a video version of this podcast on our website where you can also find a worksheet and transcript to help you learn.
zh: 我们的网站上有这期播客的视频版本,你还可以在那里找到练习题和文字稿来帮助学习。

text: Head to bbclearningenglish .com.
zh: 请访问bbclearningenglish.com。

text: Hi Neil, how are you?
zh: 嗨,Neil,你好吗?

text: I'm hungry.
zh: 我饿了。

text: Me too.
zh: 我也是。

text: I'm starving.
zh: 我快饿死了。

text: Well, that's good because we're talking about lunch today.
zh: 太好了,因为我们今天聊的正是午餐话题。

text: We're recording this just before lunch, so it's no wonder that we're both very hungry.
zh: 我们是在午饭前录制的,所以难怪我们俩都很饿。

text: You might be able to hear our tummies rumble because we're hungry.
zh: 你可能能听到我们肚子咕咕叫,因为我们饿了。

text: Okay, so shall we begin?
zh: 好,那我们开始吧?

text: Yes, let's do it.
zh: 好,开始吧。

text: What have you got for lunch today?
zh: 你今天午饭吃什么?

text: for my lunch, I have chicken with potatoes and vegetables in a harissa paste.
zh: 我今天的午餐是鸡肉配土豆和蔬菜,还有哈里萨辣酱。

text: Oh, that sounds really nice.
zh: 哦,听起来很不错。

text: Yeah, it's leftovers actually, which I have heated up and brought in in a little flask.
zh: 是的,其实是剩菜,我把它加热了,装在一个小保温盒里带来的。

text: What are leftovers?
zh: 什么是leftovers(剩菜)?

text: Good question.
zh: 好问题。

text: Leftovers.
zh: Leftovers。

text: That's food from a meal that you've already had that you didn't finish and you can heat it up and eat it again.
zh: 就是你上一顿没吃完的食物,你可以把它加热后再吃一次。

text: Yes.
zh: 对。

text: I also have leftovers for my lunch today.
zh: 我今天的午餐也是剩菜。

text: So yesterday I made a pasta for lunch with vegetables in it and I have that.
zh: 我昨天做了意大利面当午餐,里面有蔬菜,今天就吃这个。

text: So Beth, what do you usually have for lunch?
zh: 那Beth,你平时午餐一般吃什么?

text: Is it usually leftovers or something else?
zh: 通常是剩菜还是别的?

text: It's usually leftovers when I come into work because it's easier and then I don't need to buy lunch.
zh: 我上班的时候通常吃剩菜,因为比较方便,而且不用另外买午餐。

text: But if I go out and buy food, then I would usually go for something like sushi or ramen.
zh: 但如果我出去买吃的,通常会选寿司或者拉面之类的。

text: What about you?
zh: 你呢?

text: What do you usually have for lunch?
zh: 你平时午餐一般吃什么?

text: Yeah, sometimes I have leftovers that I bring in.
zh: 嗯,有时候我会带剩菜。

text: Sometimes I buy a sandwich, for example.
zh: 有时候我会买个三明治什么的。

text: What's your favourite kind of sandwich?
zh: 你最喜欢哪种三明治?

text: If I have a sandwich, if I buy a sandwich for lunch, I like to get things like smoked salmon, nice, with pickles maybe.
zh: 如果买三明治当午餐,我喜欢吃烟熏三文鱼那种,可能再加点腌菜。

text: Yeah.
zh: 嗯。

text: There's a really good baguette I like, actually, that has smoked salmon and egg mayonnaise in it.
zh: 其实我很喜欢一款法棍三明治,里面有烟熏三文鱼和蛋黄酱鸡蛋。

text: Oh, it's so nice.
zh: 哦,太好吃了。

text: Stop it.
zh: 别说了。

text: Sorry.
zh: 抱歉。

text: I'm so hungry.
zh: 我太饿了。

text: Me too.
zh: 我也是。

text: Neil, do you ever skip lunch?
zh: Neil,你有不吃午饭的时候吗?

text: No way.
zh: 绝对不会。

text: I would be in a horrible mood if I skipped lunch.
zh: 如果不吃午饭,我心情会特别糟糕。

text: I don't understand how anyone can skip any meal.
zh: 我不明白怎么会有人不吃饭。

text: I need to eat all my meals.
zh: 我每顿饭都得吃。

text: Yeah, otherwise you get hangry.
zh: 是啊,不然你会又饿又生气(hangry)。

text: Exactly.
zh: 没错。

text: Hangry is hungry and angry.
zh: Hangry就是hungry(饿)加angry(生气)。

text: I'm almost getting hangry now.
zh: 我现在都快hangry了。

text: What's your favourite meal?
zh: 你最喜欢哪一餐?

text: Is it lunch, breakfast, dinner?
zh: 是午餐、早餐还是晚餐?

text: I think the evening meal is probably my favourite because we sit at the table and chat and it's the biggest,
zh: 我觉得晚餐可能是我最喜欢的,因为我们会坐在桌前聊天,而且这是一天中最丰盛、

text: nicest meal of the day and you don't really have to do anything after so you can relax.
zh: 最美味的一餐,吃完之后也不用再做什么事,可以放松一下。

text: Yeah, that's good.
zh: 嗯,这样挺好的。

text: I really like brunch, which is that sort of in between breakfast and lunch,
zh: 我特别喜欢brunch(早午餐),就是介于早餐和午餐之间的那种,

text: maybe 10 o 'clock, and I might have eggs and bacon and hash browns and avocado, a big meal full of lots of good food, like a brunch.
zh: 大概十点左右,我可能会吃鸡蛋、培根、炸薯饼和牛油果,一大份丰盛美味的食物,就是那种brunch。

text: Do you ever have a working lunch?
zh: 你有过工作餐(边工作边吃午饭)吗?

text: I do occasionally if I'm working from home because
zh: 如果在家工作的话偶尔会有,因为

text: I can carry on working and eat quickly and then in my actual lunch break I might have a nice long walk or something like that.
zh: 我可以边工作边快速吃点东西,然后在真正的午休时间去散个长长的步之类的。

text: But when I'm in the office I don't want to eat at my desk.
zh: 但在办公室的时候,我不想在办公桌上吃饭。

text: No, me neither.
zh: 是啊,我也不想。

text: I don't really like working lunches.
zh: 我不太喜欢边工作边吃午饭。

text: I would rather eat my lunch without working.
zh: 我更愿意专心吃午饭,不做别的事。

text: Yeah, I'd prefer the same really.
zh: 嗯,我也更喜欢那样。

text: Let's recap the language we heard during the conversation.
zh: 我们来回顾一下对话中出现的表达吧。

text: We heard skip, which means not have or do.
zh: 我们听到了skip,意思是不进行或不做某事。

text: For example, I never skip lunch.
zh: 比如,我从不skip lunch(不吃午饭)。

text: We heard working lunch, which is when you eat your lunch while you're working.
zh: 我们还听到了working lunch,指的是边工作边吃午饭。

text: We also had leftovers, which is when you don't finish a meal, so you have more of it at a different time, like the next day.
zh: 我们也提到了leftovers,指没吃完的饭菜,留到之后的时间,比如第二天再吃。

text: And we talked about which meals and food we prefer.
zh: 我们还聊到了自己更喜欢哪些餐点和食物。

text: If you prefer something, you like it better than something else.
zh: 如果你prefer某样东西,意思是你更喜欢它,胜过其他的。

text: Yes, and another phrase we can use to say this is would rather.
zh: 没错,还有一个表达同样意思的短语是would rather。

text: For example, For example, I'd rather have sushi than a sandwich for lunch.
zh: 比如,比起三明治,我午餐更想吃寿司(I'd rather have sushi than a sandwich for lunch)。

text: That's it for this episode of Real Easy English.
zh: 《Real Easy English》这一期就到这里。

text: Test what you've learned with a worksheet on our website bbclearningenglish .com.
zh: 到我们网站bbclearningenglish.com做练习题,检验一下你学到的内容吧。

text: And make sure you join us again for another Easy English conversation.
zh: 记得下次继续加入我们,一起进行简单英语对话。

text: We'll be back next week.
zh: 我们下周再见。

text: See you soon.
zh: 回头见。

text: Goodbye.
zh: 再见。
